LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-25-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION IS GRANTED. ALTHOUGH THE MOTION WAS NOT TIMELY FILED, IT WAS TIMELY SERVED ON DEFENDANT, WHO DID NOT FILE ANY OPPOSITION. PROPOSED JUDGMENT RECEIVED. THE COURT INSTRUCTS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT WHICH REFLECTS THE COURT'S RULING AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS UNOPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JONATHAN VAKNIN of Kenosian & Miele, LLP (Tel: 323-297-2100) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion is granted. Although the motion was not timely filed, it was timely served on defendant, who did not file any opposition.

Proposed judgment received.

The Court instructs plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court which reflects the Court's ruling and states that the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
